description: CompositionBlack track suitHooded track jacket made of 100% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hoodie with bright pink lining, zippered closure on the front, insert pockets on the sides, brand details printed on the upper left chest and a ribbed hemlineTrack pant made of 100% polyester, has a wide elasticated waistband with a drawcord on the inside, insert pockets on the sides, embroidered swoosh logo on the left leg and bright pink piping on the side seamsFittingRegularWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleachCool iron and do not iron designDo not dry cleanLook on trend while training in this black tracksuit from the Athletic Department collection of nike. The polyester fabric provides greater comfort and allows you to train longer. The tracksuit can be worn together or as separates and is perfect for gym sessions or sporting activities. The track jacket can be worn with t-shirts and jeans as well.
